executive_summary: 3-4 sentence overview. What is the site's biggest strength? What are the top 2-3 conversion blockers? What is the single most important improvement?

visual_design.issue: One sentence description of the visual or UX problem
visual_design.impact: Why this hurts conversions or credibility for a manufacturing buyer
visual_design.suggestion: High-level fix — what to do, not how to code it

seo_data_summary.meta_title: Paste the actual meta title from data.json
seo_data_summary.meta_description: Paste the actual meta description from data.json

competitor_intro: 1-2 sentences introducing the benchmarking section. Frame it as: here is what leading players in your space are doing that you are not.

competitors.name: Competitor company name and website
competitors.observation: 2-3 sentences: what specific feature or practice they have that the client lacks, and why it matters

quick_wins.impact: Short description of expected conversion impact

next_steps_intro: 1-2 sentences. Acknowledge we've identified a clear path forward. Invite them to go deeper.
next_steps: Quick wins: implement the High-priority items from the table above
Strategy session: schedule a 30-minute call to walk through a redesign roadmap
Benchmark review: see how a redesigned version of your site would compare to top competitors
call_to_action: One compelling sentence inviting them to book a call. Warm, not pushy.
